reasons: The output keeps a visibly feminine presentation across the sampled frames.
Frame-to-frame identity remains stable and there is no obvious face switching.
The previous regression toward the original male-looking reference is largely corrected.
caveats: The result is still stylized and not perfectly natural in every frame.
The fix depends on the bootstrap female reference image rather than the original default ref_face.jpg.
next_action: Use this candidate as the new working baseline and replace the old male reference in the generation path.
